Speaker: Man
Text: There's no such thing.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Well, no, the goggle.

Text: The goggle?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Yeah.

Text: Only thing I've ever heard of called a "goggle" is for swimming.

Speaker: Man
Text: I've never heard of one in electronics.

Text: Well, no, Tandy make the Goggle.

Text: No, sir.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Oh, maybe it is realistic, then, yeah, I'm sorry, maybe I'm mistaken.

Speaker: Man
Text: Same company. Uh, let me put ya on hold.

Text: Have you got it in stock, though?

Speaker: Man
Text: Sir, I don't even know what you're talking about.

Text: What's the problem here, uh... sonny?

Speaker: Man
Text: Well, sir, I think what the problem is, is that you're...

Speaker: Man
Text: The problem is that you're calling up on a repeated basis asking for things that we don't carry to waste our time.

Text: Such as?

Speaker: Man
Text: These things you've been asking for today.

Speaker: Man
Text: The only thing I carry that you've asked for today is a toggle switch.

Speaker: LPC
Text: You don't have a Giglio goggle?

Speaker: Man
Text: Sir, there's no such thing, and I think you're just messing with me.

Text: We don't have the time, and if I could trace you, I would have you charged with phone harassment.

Text: This is a valid inquiry about your...

Speaker: LPC
Text: about your selections.

Speaker: LPC
Text: That's all I'm doing.

Speaker: LPC
Text: I'm prepared to buy all the aforementioned items for me.

Text: Well, like I said, if you can bring in the equipment for us to look at it,

Speaker: Man
Text: then we'll see what we have to match it up.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Alright.

Speaker: Man
Text: But I've never heard of anything with the terms that you've used.

Speaker: Man
Text: I either learn the correct terminology so that we can talk with understanding,

Speaker: Man
Text: or please don't waste my time.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Okay.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Can you help me out with one final thing?

Speaker: LPC
Text: I hope I'm not, if we've got just a moment.

Speaker: LPC
Text: up, if you've got just a moment?

Text: Sure, go ahead.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Um... I was looking for a Nimbostratus Zackit.

Text: A "Nimbostratus Zackit"?

Text: That's correct.

Text: So, you're looking for a cloud Zackit?

Text: No, that's just the brand name. Uh... it's, it's... it's made by Tandy.

Text: Sir, nimbostratus is a type of cloud.

Text: Okay.

Text: There's no such thing made by Tandy with that name.

Speaker: LPC
Text: It's, it's, it's a... It's... It's a device used... made by Tandy to measure the... measure the f... uh... the... the dickit.
